---
title: 'Roses'
date: '2014-02-01T05:02:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Preston Markus Wolfe - Journal'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7879783522643097350'
blogger_filename: '/2014/01/roses.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Preston Markus Wolfe - Journal/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

Keep smelling the roses. Your love for the now is inspirational. However you need to keep moving too. Life won't always come as easy as you want. But its worth pushing past to your goals.
